sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, multi_line String, category String);
SELECT firstLine(multi_line) AS first, category FROM test_strings WHERE category NOT IN (SELECT category FROM test_strings WHERE multi_line != '');
SELECT firstLine(multi_line) AS first, count(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY first HAVING first NOT IN ('foo', 'hello');
SELECT firstLine(multi_line) AS first FROM (SELECT multi_line FROM test_strings WHERE category NOT IN ('B')) WHERE first IS NOT NULL;
SELECT firstLine(CONCAT(multi_line, '\n', 'extraLine')) AS first FROM test_strings WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE category = 'C') WHERE multi_line = '');
SELECT DISTINCT firstLine(multi_line) FROM test_strings WHERE multi_line NOT IN (SELECT firstLine(multi_line) FROM test_strings WHERE category = 'A') ORDER BY first;
SELECT firstLine(NULLIF(multi_line, '')) AS first FROM test_strings WHERE multi_line NOT IN (SELECT multi_line FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2);
SELECT firstLine(value) AS first_value FROM temp_test WHERE first_value NOT IN (SELECT firstLine(value) FROM temp_test WHERE value LIKE 'example%');
